Identified

European Sea Bass

Dicentrarchus labrax 78% Match

About

Also known as seabass, is a species of carnivorous ray-finned fish.

HabitatCoastal waters
Max Size100 cm
DietFish, Crustaceans
Best TimeDawn & Dusk
